ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cookies" (
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie */,
  "cookie_name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the cookie */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the cookie is stored */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider of the cookie */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of cookie */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain for which the cookie is set */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path for which the cookie is set */,
  "same_site" TEXT /* SameSite attribute of the cookie */,
  "secure" INTEGER /* Secure attribute of the cookie */,
  "http_only" INTEGER /* HttpOnly attribute of the cookie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES cookie_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_purpose FOREIGN KEY ("purpose") REFERENCES cookie_purposes ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the provider */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purpose */,
  "purpose_description" TEXT /* Description of the purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_consents" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving consent */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie for which consent is given */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when consent was given */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of consent (e.g., granted, denied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_consents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_consents_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., visitor, registered user, admin) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity during the session */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* HTTP referrer of the user's session */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the user during the session */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used by the user during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytics service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider of the service */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration settings for the analytics service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_services_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_cookies" (
  "service_cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service-cookie association */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analytics service */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_cookies_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES analytics_services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_cookies_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "a_b_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each A/B test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the A/B test */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the test */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the test */,
  "variation_a" TEXT /* Description of variation A */,
  "variation_b" TEXT /* Description of variation B */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the test */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the A/B test (e.g., 'in progress', 'completed') */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winning variation of the A/B test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personalization_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personalization rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions for applying the rule */,
  "actions" TEXT /* Actions to take when the rule applies */,
  "rule_status" TEXT /* Status of the personalization rule (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "regulation" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date when compliance was achieved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., 'compliant', 'non-compliant') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the engagement metric */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the engagement metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_category_mapping" (
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_id", "category_id")
)
